languages.text: Записи Экзальта-117 гласят, что Себериан миновал боковые врата и скрылся во чреве руин. Следует отправиться за ним.

traits.locale_text: Записи Экзальта-117 гласят, что Себериан миновал боковые врата и скрылся во чреве руин. Следует отправиться за ним.

languages.text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.
languages.original_text: Записи Экзальта-117 гласят, что Себериан миновал боковые врата и скрылся во чреве руин. Следует отправиться за ним.

traits.locale_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.
Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.
Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.
Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

languages.text: Die Protokolle von Exalt-117' belegen, dass Seberian durch das Seitentor gegangen und im Herz der Ruinen verschwunden ist. Du musst seiner Spur folgen.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

traits.locale_text: Die Protokolle von Exalt-117' belegen, dass Seberian durch das Seitentor gegangen und im Herz der Ruinen verschwunden ist. Du musst seiner Spur folgen.

languages.text: Les journaux d'Exalt-117 indiquent que Seberian est passé par la porte secondaire et a disparu dans les profondeurs des ruines. Vous devez suivre sa piste.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

traits.locale_text: Les journaux d'Exalt-117 indiquent que Seberian est passé par la porte secondaire et a disparu dans les profondeurs des ruines. Vous devez suivre sa piste.

languages.text: 尊使-117的日志显示，塞贝里安穿过了侧门，消失在遗迹深处。你必须追踪他的足迹。
languages.original_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

traits.locale_text: 尊使-117的日志显示，塞贝里安穿过了侧门，消失在遗迹深处。你必须追踪他的足迹。

languages.text: Los registros de Exaltado-117 muestran que Seberian pasó por la puerta lateral y desapareció en el corazón de las ruinas. Sigue su rastro.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

traits.locale_text: Los registros de Exaltado-117 muestran que Seberian pasó por la puerta lateral y desapareció en el corazón de las ruinas. Sigue su rastro.

languages.text: Exalta-117の記録によると、セベリアンは通用門をくぐり、遺跡の腹の中へと消えていったという。彼を追え。
languages.original_text: Exalta-117 records say that Seberian has passed through the side gate, disappearing into the belly of the ruins. Follow him.

languages.text: Yüce-117'nin kayıtları, Seberian'ın yan kapıdan geçerek harabelerin kalbinde kaybolduğunu gösteriyor. Onun izini sürmelisin.
languages.original_text: Exalt-117's logs show Seberian passed through the side gate and vanished into the heart of the ruins. You must follow his trail.

traits.locale_text: Yüce-117'nin kayıtları, Seberian'ın yan kapıdan geçerek harabelerin kalbinde kaybolduğunu gösteriyor. Onun izini sürmelisin.
